assertions.title: Merge coordination prevents conflicting run completion

steps.action: Navigate to Autopilot tab of test project
steps.expected: Delivery Runs section with merge coordination UI
steps.observed: Delivery Runs section visible with 4 runs (all pending, isolated workspaces). No merge conflict indicators, product lock badges, or blocking reasons visible.

steps.action: Verify UI code for merge coordination exists in dist/ui/index.js
steps.observed: CONFIRMED: usePluginData(DATA_KEYS2.productLocks) at line 568; activeMergeConflicts computed at line 577; hasMergeConflict badge at line 668; Product Lock badge at line 693

steps.action: Verify backend worker.js has product lock action handlers
steps.observed: NOT FOUND in worker.js. Action keys defined (lines 7483-7485) but no ctx.actions.register calls for these keys. grep confirms 0 occurrences of upsertProductLock, acquireProductLock, listProductLockEntities in worker.js

steps.action: Verify backend worker.js has product lock data handlers
steps.observed: NOT FOUND. No ctx.data.register for productLock or productLocks in worker.js
WORKER_ERROR: No action handler registered for key 'acquire-product-lock'

steps.expected: Product locks list or empty array
steps.observed: WORKER_ERROR: No data handler registered for key 'product-locks'

apiResponses.acquire-product-lock: WORKER_ERROR: No action handler registered for key 'acquire-product-lock'
apiResponses.check-stuck-runs: WORKER_ERROR: No action handler registered for key 'check-stuck-runs'
apiResponses.product-locks-data: WORKER_ERROR: No data handler registered for key 'product-locks'

codeAnalysis.ui_code_exists: dist/ui/index.js contains usePluginData(product-locks), activeMergeConflicts, hasMergeConflict badge, Product Lock badge
codeAnalysis.worker_action_handlers_missing: dist/worker.js does not contain upsertProductLock, listProductLockEntities, ctx.actions.register for acquire-product-lock/release-product-lock/check-merge-conflict
codeAnalysis.worker_data_handlers_missing: dist/worker.js does not contain ctx.data.register for product-lock or product-locks
codeAnalysis.source_has_impl: src/autopilot/helpers.ts has upsertProductLock (line 741), findProductLock (line 747), listProductLockEntities (line 775). src/autopilot/worker.ts has ctx.actions.register for acquireProductLock (line 2718), releaseProductLock, checkMergeConflict
codeAnalysis.not_wired: src/worker.ts (main entry point) does not import upsertProductLock/listProductLockEntities from autopilot/helpers.ts and does not register these handlers

issues.description: Product lock backend not wired into main worker.ts: autopilot/helpers.ts has the implementations but worker.ts entry point doesn't import them and doesn't register the data/action handlers
issues.impact: Cannot create product locks to test merge conflict UI. API returns 'No action handler registered' for acquire-product-lock. UI queries product-locks data and gets empty results (no handler).

frictions.description: Could not verify UI response to product locks because backend action handlers are missing. This is a backend integration gap, not a UI issue. The UI code is correct but disconnected from backend.

blockers.reason: Cannot validate merge coordination UI because backend product lock handlers are not registered in worker.js. Source has the implementations but they're not wired into the main worker entry point. Requires: (1) import product lock helpers into worker.ts, (2) register product-locks data handler, (3) register acquire-product-lock, release-product-lock, check-merge-conflict action handlers, (4) rebuild plugin.

summary: Round 11 re-validation of VAL-AUTOPILOT-037 after commit b5b44aad (merge coordination UI indicators). The UI code IS deployed and visible in dist/ui/index.js with correct merge conflict and product lock badge rendering. However, the backend worker.js is MISSING all product lock data and action handlers. Source analysis reveals: src/autopilot/helpers.ts has upsertProductLock/listProductLockEntities and src/autopilot/worker.ts has the action registrations, but these were never imported or registered in the main src/worker.ts entry point. Cannot create product locks to test UI response — API returns 'No action handler registered'. VAL-AUTOPILOT-037 remains FAILED (blocked by missing backend integration).
